sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.16 hardens the external target-stack probe. It sends a browser Accept header so origin WAFs that reject header-poor requests with HTTP 415 now return a usable response. A rejected or errored probe (any 4xx) is reported as 'probe failed' instead of being mislabeled 'not WordPress', so a blocked probe no longer suppresses the optimizer bypass on a real WordPress target. Negative or indeterminate probe verdicts are cached for 15 minutes (instead of 24 hours) so a transient block (a rate limit or bot challenge) self-heals on the next scan. Same-site scans are unaffected; they use local plugin detection, not the external HTTP probe.
